case_title: MALIK ZOROM VS. ACCORD EXPORT LINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE - UNABLE TO FORWARD) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ACCORD EXPORT LINES, INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY ZOROM, MALIK ACCORD EXPORT LINES, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZOROM, MALIK AS TO DEFENDANT ACCORD EXPORT LINES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED AUG-07-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ACCORD EXPORT LINES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM SAMUEL LAW. PLAINTIFF MALIK ZOROM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ACCORD EXPORT LINES, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MIKE ANSARI, MANAGER. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL LAW; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-19-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-19-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MALIK ZOROM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ACCORD EXPORT LINES, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,445.00 FILED BY ZOROM, MALIK AS TO DEFENDANT ACCORD EXPORT LINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ACCORD EXPORT LINES, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZOROM, MALIK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ACCORD EXPORT LINES, INC. THE EVIDENCE CLEARLY SHOW THAT THE PLACE OF DELIVERY WAS TEMA WITH PLAINTIFF'S CONSENT. IT ALSO APPEARS THAT THIS CLAIM HAS ALREADY BEEN ADJUDICATED BY A ST. LOUIS COURT; PLAINTIFF CAN NOT SUE AGAIN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
